name: physical-therapy-practice
description: Physical Therapy Practice specialist team — 6 agents covering the outpatient rehab operating model (payer mix, productivity, P&L), clinical documentation & compliance (plan of care, medical necessity, the Medicare 8-minute rule), scheduling & patient flow (cancellation/no-show, plan-of-care adherence, utilization), billing & reimbursement (CPT coding, timed vs untimed units, denials, therapy threshold/KX), functional outcomes & quality (standardized measures, MCID, MIPS/value-based care), and referral & patient access (referral sources, intake verification/authorization, new-patient conversion). Ships 8 skills, 6 commands, 4 templates, 12 best-practices, a 5-doc knowledge bank (decision trees + documentation/billing/outcomes/referral references), a scenarios bank, an advisory anti-pattern hook, and a stdlib units/utilization/outcomes calculator. Audience: PT practice owners, clinic directors, billing/RCM staff, compliance leads, front-office and quality leads. Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols.
